name: Senia
tagline: Three-Michelin-star trained chef running two experiences under one roof — casual a la carte downstairs, elite 8-seat Chef's Counter upstairs.
mustOrder: Chef's Counter tasting menu (Fri/Sat only, reserve weeks ahead)
any dessert — pastry chef Michelle Karr-Ueoka trained at Per Se and French Laundry
parking: Street parking on King/Nuuanu; paid lots on Smith St
talkStory: Opened in 2016 by Chef Chris Kajioka and pastry chef Michelle Karr-Ueoka, both Alan Wong alumni. Kajioka trained at Per Se under Thomas Keller and at Vintage Cave. The 8-seat Chef's Counter (Fri-Sat only) is a multi-course tasting menu ranked among Hawaii's best dining experiences — book 3-4 weeks ahead. Won Hale 'Aina Gold for Best Restaurant and Best Tasting Menu multiple years. The a la carte dining room downstairs is more approachable for a weeknight. Michelle's desserts draw on French Laundry precision with local Hawaiian flavors.
